chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision Application No.S-60 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 579/2021 2.For orders on CMA 580/2021 3.For hearing of main case 4.For orders on CMA 581/2021 04-03-2024 None present for the applicants. ***** None present for the applicants. Since filing of this Civil Revision on 03.04.2021, neither applicants nor their counsel has taken any interest to pursue the same. Today, also no one is present on behalf of applicants and no intimation is received. Accordingly, this Civil Revision Application along with listed applications is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
